name: Magic Italiano
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the finely chopped pepperoni.
2. In another bowl, mix 1 1/4 cups of bisquick mix, 3/4 cup of mayonnaise, and 1 egg. Stir well and add to the other ingredients.
3. Take 4 pieces of pocket pita bread and slice each into 8 halves.
4. Spread the combined ingredients evenly over the sliced pita bread.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes. The finished product should resemble little pizzas.
